description: User is viewing flight options from Melbourne to Palermo on Google Flights.
frame_description: The screen shows Google Flights search results for a one-way trip from Melbourne to Palermo on October 19th.

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'New Tab' button in the browser.
frame_description: The cursor moves from the flight results area up to the browser tab bar.

description: User clicks the plus icon to open a new browser tab.
frame_description: The user activates the new tab button.

description: A new Google Chrome tab page loads.
frame_description: The browser displays the default new tab page with a search bar and site shortcuts.

description: User types 'rome to rio' into the browser's address bar.
frame_description: Text appears in the address bar as the user types.

description: Search suggestions dropdown appears as the user types.
frame_description: A list of autocomplete suggestions appears below the address bar.

description: User selects the 'rome to rio app' option from the search suggestions.
frame_description: The user clicks on one of the suggested search terms in the dropdown.

description: Page navigates to Google search results for 'rome to rio'.
frame_description: The Google search results page loads, showing links for Rome2Rio.

description: User hovers the cursor over the main Rome2Rio search result.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the first organic search result link.

description: User clicks on the Rome2Rio website link.
frame_description: The user clicks the link to navigate to the Rome2Rio site.

description: The Rome2Rio homepage loads.
page_title: Rome2Rio: Discover how to get anywhere
frame_description: The Rome2Rio homepage is displayed with its search interface.

description: User hovers over the 'From' input field.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the origin location input box.

description: User clicks into the 'From' location field to change it.
frame_description: The user clicks the origin field, clearing the previous value.

description: User types 'Ro' into the origin field.
frame_description: The letters 'Ro' appear in the origin input box.

description: A location suggestion dropdown appears.
frame_description: A list of cities starting with 'Ro' appears below the input field.

description: User selects 'Rome, Italy' from the suggestions.
frame_description: The user clicks on the 'Rome, Italy' option in the dropdown.

description: User clicks into the destination field.
frame_description: The user clicks the destination field, highlighting the existing text.

description: User types 'palem' into the destination field.
frame_description: The user types the start of 'Palermo' into the destination box.

description: Location suggestions for the destination appear.
frame_description: A dropdown list of destination suggestions appears.

description: User selects 'Palermo, Italy' from the dropdown.
frame_description: The user clicks on the 'Palermo, Italy' option.

description: User hovers over the 'See all options' search button.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the pink search button.

description: User clicks the search button to find travel options.
frame_description: The user activates the search button.

description: The travel options results page for Rome to Palermo loads.
page_title: Rome to Palermo: 8 ways to travel from Rome to Palermo
frame_description: The results page loads with a list of travel methods on the left.

description: The map and travel route details finish loading on the results page.
frame_description: The map on the right side of the screen updates to show the route between Rome and Palermo.

description: Hotel recommendations and a Booking.com advertisement appear on the right side of the page.
frame_description: New UI elements for hotels and ads render on the right panel.
